name: Apple Streusel Ladder Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the bread dough in half. On a lightly floured surface, roll each half into an 8-inch square.
- For easier rolling, let the dough rest for a few minutes.
2. Spread each square with about 1 tablespoon of softened butter.
3. Prepare the filling by combining brown sugar, 1 tablespoon flour, and cinnamon in a bowl. Add apples and toss to coat evenly.
4. Spread half of the filling down the center of each square.
5. Starting from the right edge toward the filling, make 2-1/2-inch long cuts into the dough at 1-inch intervals. Repeat from the left edge.
6. Fold strips alternately over the filling.
7. Fold the ends under to seal.
8. Place the loaves on a greased jelly-roll pan (15x10x1 inch). Brush with milk.
9. Combine flour and sugar in another bowl, then cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
10. Sprinkle half of the crumbs over each loaf. Top with almonds if desired.
11. Cover and let the loaves rise until nearly doubled in size, about 45 to 60 minutes.
12. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve warm.
